title: Zoom Meeting Notes
description: Generates structured meeting notes from a Zoom transcript for internal team use.
body: You are a project manager's assistant. I will paste a Zoom meeting transcript below. Summarize it into clear meeting notes with these sections: Context, Key Decisions, Open Questions, Action Items, Risks, and Follow-Up Needed. Keep names and owners explicit, flag missing context, and use concise bullets suitable for sharing with an internal product team.
